Narrow fixes covered UAE trade-licence precision/full-code capture, public/generic IVR and contact-centre phone bait, public non-binding MoU wording, negated genetic-data prose, Unicode spa-day bait, masked Emirates-ID fragments, phone-like device/date fragments, and Arabic-style hyphenated names. _label_tier_note: AE Stage B cleanup: must_detect is the strict detector-aligned benchmark tier; ideal_must_detect preserves broader auto-labeled statutory coverage for gap discovery. ideal_must_detect is not a locked recall baseline. Stage B labels are project-owner approved for internal benchmarking.

must_detect.matched_text:
Strictly Non‑Public — Inside Information — UAE PDPL/SCA — Project Falcon — Board Briefing (DIFC) — Embargo until 17 July 2026 09:00 GST.
Issuer: Al Noor Logistics PJSC (ADGM registration ADGM–A1O3X), Target: Blue Palm Warehousing LLC (Dubai), definitive Share Purchase Agreement (SPA) scheduled for execution on 24 June 2026.
Consideration: AED 182,500,000 for 83.0% equity; seller rollover for Mr. Karim Haddad (E I D: 7 8 4‑xx87‑13 34 567‑5) retaining 17.0%, subject to ADGM/DIFC fit‑and‑proper.
Trade licence (Dubai): TL–DXB–2O24–00I2 (legacy scan shows O/0 transposition), reg. office: Unit 1402, Marasim North Tower, Al Qaws Free Zone, RAK.
These materials are non‑public and price‑sensitive; no external circulation until ADX disclosure; IR draft to be staged only post‑embargo.
MAC/MAE: no material adverse change will be deemed to arise from seasonal throughput variance, FX moves within ±5%, or published public‑health advisories; pandemics and regional conflicts are carved out.
For the avoidance of doubt, the parties confirm that no MAC has occurred as at the date hereof.
Chair: H.E. Ms. Laila Al Rashid; contact: laila.rashid@al-noor.example for board queries and clean‑team access.
Funding mix: AED 120,000,000 secured murabaha plus AED 62,500,000 deferred seller note; pro forma net leverage 3.1x; earn‑out up to AED 25,000,000 tied to FY27 EBITDA.
Conditions precedent include renewal of 5 key MOAs with top shippers and SCA/ADX notification; draft disclosure prepared, not filed.
Public‑source context only: see 2023 ADGM discussion paper on M&A transparency and the DFM issuer guide (stale; last updated 2021).
lowercase project‑management: move docs to the dataroom by monday, tag ‘falcon‑ir’, and ping nadim when the cp checklist hits 90%.
Data room: https://vault.al-noor.example/falcon/index.html?emb=17-07-2026&uid=PRJ%2F-FALC0N%2FQ%CE%9FE; refer to folder 04\Fin\QoE\ver‑2 for scanned ids.
PDPL handling: restrict access to Emirates ID scans, family‑origin notes for the Haddad household, and HR visa files to the legal clean team only.
Compliance: DFSA MAR and ADGM FSMR market‑abuse prohibitions apply; maintain insider lists; do not discuss over non‑secure channels; embargo notice posted 3 June 2026.
